prestazioni: 3UR-FE 5.7L V8 engine forced induction via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (850cc injectors, 10psi boost, intercooled, supporting fuel system with Walbro 450LPH dual pumps and Radium Engineering fuel surge tank)

Full bolt-on exhaust system by Tomei with 3.5" titanium-coated downpipes, custom 76mm mid-pipe, and dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips with GReddy Profec E-02 electronic boost controller for optimized backpressure management

KW Suspensions Variant 5 coilovers with 800lb/in front springs and 600lb/in rear springs, adjustable camber plates, and remote reservoir damping for off-road and on-road performance, paired with SPC Adjustable Rear Upper Control Arms for precise alignment
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (LX 570-specific, 3-piece fender flares with carbon fiber construction, extended rocker panels, and custom rear diffuser with integrated LED lighting)

Vorsteiner V-FF 107 22" forged wheels (9.5" front, 11.5" rear, ET25 offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35/22 front, 325/30/22 rear) with H&R Trak+ wheel spacers for aggressive stance
Seibon Carbon fiber hood with functional dual heat extractors, custom LED headlight conversion with Morimoto XB LED bulbs, and rear taillight blackout with Diode Dynamics SS3 sequential turn signals
